next_blocker: Need an in-process debugger-capable DOSBox/DOSBox-X run to break at F0365/F0380/F0377/F0280 and classify whether C080 is absent before the queue, present but not dispatched, reaches F0377 but misses C05/front-wall sensor, or reaches F0280.

source_citations.point: G0432_as_CommandQueue, first/last indices, queue lock, and pending-click globals are the original queue storage to watch.
The movement secondary mouse table maps the viewport/zone C007 left-click to C080_COMMAND_CLICK_IN_DUNGEON_VIEW.

source_citations.point: F0365 records pending click fields, resolves primary/secondary mouse input into L1109_i_Command, and writes nonzero commands plus X/Y into G0432_as_CommandQueue.
F0380 dequeues command/X/Y from G0432_as_CommandQueue, unlocks/processes pending clicks, then dispatches C080 to F0377_COMMAND_ProcessType80_ClickInDungeonView.
F0441_STARTEND_ProcessEntrance discards input, waits on C099_MODE_WAITING_ON_ENTRANCE, processes keys, and calls F0380 each loop before loading the dungeon.
F0377 is the C080 handler; PC builds subtract the viewport origin, then empty-hand C05 wall-ornament hits call F0372 to touch the front-wall sensor.
A no-leader party may still trigger C127_SENSOR_WALL_CHAMPION_PORTRAIT; that case calls F0280_CHAMPION_AddCandidateChampionToParty.
F0280_CHAMPION_AddCandidateChampionToParty is the semantic transition: it requires an empty hand and party count <4, then consumes G0305_ui_PartyChampionCount to build the candidate champion.

focused_runs.name: source_gated_portrait_then_resurrect
focused_runs.reason: gated gameplay reached, but source portrait click x=111/y=82 produced no visible candidate transition; blocker is now C007/C080 mouse delivery or front-wall hit-state mismatch before F0280

source_queue_path.queue_storage: COMMAND.C:1-14 defines G0432_as_CommandQueue plus first/last indices and pending click fields.
source_queue_path.viewport_to_c080: COMMAND.C:108-114 and 397-403 map screen/zone C007 viewport left-clicks to C080_COMMAND_CLICK_IN_DUNGEON_VIEW.
source_queue_path.mouse_enqueue: COMMAND.C:1465-1662 has F0365 derive L1109_i_Command from mouse input and enqueue nonzero commands with X/Y into G0432_as_CommandQueue.
source_queue_path.dequeue_dispatch: COMMAND.C:2045-2126 dequeues L1160/L1161/L1162; COMMAND.C:2322-2323 dispatches C080 to F0377_COMMAND_ProcessType80_ClickInDungeonView.
source_queue_path.front_wall_to_f0280: CLIKVIEW.C:348-349 subtracts viewport origin; CLIKVIEW.C:407-431 touches the front wall sensor; MOVESENS.C:1392 and 1501-1502 permit C127 with no leader and call F0280.

breakpoints.name: mouse interrupt / enqueue candidate
breakpoints.condition: after click x=111,y=82, expect L1109_i_Command == C080 and queue write into G0432_as_CommandQueue with X=111,Y=82 (screen-relative PC coordinates).

breakpoints.name: queue dequeue
breakpoints.condition: break before/after L1160/L1161/L1162 are read; expect L1160_i_Command == C080_COMMAND_CLICK_IN_DUNGEON_VIEW and L1161/L1162 == 111/82.

breakpoints.name: C080 dispatch
breakpoints.condition: break on function entry; PC-normalized viewport point should become x=111-G2067, y=82-G2068 and hit C05 front-wall ornament/portrait box.

breakpoints.name: front-wall portrait sensor
breakpoints.condition: break on F0280; expect P0596_ui_ChampionPortraitIndex/sensorData == 10 and G0305_ui_PartyChampionCount to advance after candidate setup.

non_goals: do not try more portrait coordinates
do not treat visual dungeon_gameplay hash as party/control readiness
